mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total", COUNT(CASE WHEN state_id = 'OPEN' THEN 1 END) AS "open", COUNT(CASE WHEN state_id = 'UNDER_REVIEW' THEN 1 END) AS "underReview", COUNT(CASE WHEN state_id = 'ESCALATED' THEN 1 END) AS "escalated", COUNT(CASE WHEN state_id = 'RESOLVED' THEN 1 END) AS "resolved", COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN state_id = 'RESOLVED' THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolution_date - created_time)) / 86400 END), 0) AS "avgResolutionDays" FROM dispute
AND seller_id = #{filters.sellerId}
